hypothesis: Sampler profiles that boosted creativity on MPS (anti_repetition, spread_topk_minp) replicate directionally on CUDA across all model families.
note: Phase 5 shifts axis from external multi-call methods (restlessness, best_of_k) to internal sampler profiles. one_shot is the method so decoding does the work, not repeated prompting.

acceptance.claim_language: sampler profiles expose latent creative diversity on CUDA without repeated prompting

grid_estimate: 6 models x 5 profiles x 3 tasks x 2 seeds ~ 1,560 runs (one_shot only)
